title: pimelea fugiens
intro: Pimelea fugiens, also known as the 'Native Rice Flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pimelea fugiens include the relief of cold and flu symptoms, reduction of inflammation, and promotion of wound healing. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
